---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in fish-bridge-mcp
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Exact commands that reproduce the issue
fish-bridge ingest --source ...
```

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened, including any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: `python --version`
- fish-bridge-mcp version: `fish-bridge --version` or `pip show fish-bridge-mcp`
- Installation method: [uv tool install / pip / from source]
- Extraction backend: [local / claude / openai / gemini]

## Additional context
Any other context, logs, or screenshots. **Do not paste API keys or private conversation content.**
